vocabulary.example: 我们应该注意饮食习惯，以免营养不均衡影响健康。
vocabulary.translation: We should pay attention to our dietary habits so as to avoid unbalanced nutrition affecting our health.

vocabulary.example: 定期检查有助于早期发现症状，及时进行治疗。
vocabulary.translation: Regular check-ups help with early detection of symptoms so that treatment can be given promptly.

vocabulary.example: 只有按时服用药物，才能确保治疗效果。
vocabulary.translation: Only by taking medication on time can the effectiveness of the treatment be ensured.

vocabulary.example: 预防疾病有助于减轻医疗系统的压力，也对个人健康有益。
vocabulary.translation: Preventing illness helps reduce the pressure on the healthcare system and is also beneficial to personal health.

vocabulary.example: 我们应该注意饮食习惯，以免营养不均衡影响健康。
vocabulary.translation: We should pay attention to our dietary habits so as to avoid unbalanced nutrition affecting our health.

vocabulary.example: 定期检查有助于早期发现症状，及时进行治疗。
vocabulary.translation: Regular check-ups help with early detection of symptoms so that treatment can be given promptly.

vocabulary.example: 预防疾病有助于减轻医疗系统的压力，也对个人健康有益。
vocabulary.translation: Preventing illness helps reduce the pressure on the healthcare system and is also beneficial to personal health.

vocabulary.example: 手术后，医生建议他多休息，以便尽快康复。
vocabulary.translation: After the surgery, the doctor advised him to rest more so as to recover as soon as possible.

vocabulary.example: 手术后，医生建议他多休息，以便尽快康复。
vocabulary.translation: After the surgery, the doctor advised him to rest more so as to recover as soon as possible.

vocabulary.example: 只有按时服用药物，才能确保治疗效果。
vocabulary.translation: Only by taking medication on time can the effectiveness of the treatment be ensured.

vocabulary.example: 只有保持良好的饮食习惯，才能真正提高免疫力。
vocabulary.translation: Only by maintaining good dietary habits can one truly boost their immunity.

vocabulary.example: 只有保持良好的饮食习惯，才能真正提高免疫力。
vocabulary.translation: Only by maintaining good dietary habits can one truly boost their immunity.

vocabulary.pinyin: liáng hǎo de yǐn shí xí guàn

key_sentences.chinese: 我们应该注意饮食习惯，以免营养不均衡影响健康。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men yīng gāi zhù yì yǐn shí xí guàn, yǐ miǎn yíng yǎng bù jūn héng yǐng xiǎng jiàn kāng.
key_sentences.english: We should pay attention to our dietary habits so as to avoid unbalanced nutrition affecting our health.

key_sentences.chinese: 定期检查有助于早期发现症状，及时进行治疗。
key_sentences.pinyin: Dìng qī jiǎn chá yǒu zhù yú zǎo qī fā xiàn zhèng zhuàng, jí shí jìn xíng zhì liáo.
key_sentences.english: Regular check-ups help with early detection of symptoms so that treatment can be given promptly.

key_sentences.chinese: 只有保持良好的饮食习惯，才能真正提高免疫力。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhǐ yǒu bǎo chí liáng hǎo de yǐn shí xí guàn, cái néng zhēn zhèng tí gāo miǎn yì lì.
key_sentences.english: Only by maintaining good dietary habits can one truly boost their immunity.

key_sentences.chinese: 手术后，医生建议他多休息，以便尽快康复。
key_sentences.pinyin: Shǒu shù hòu, yī shēng jiàn yì tā duō xiū xi, yǐ biàn jǐn kuài kāng fù.
key_sentences.english: After the surgery, the doctor advised him to rest more so as to recover as soon as possible.

key_sentences.chinese: 预防疾病有助于减轻医疗系统的压力，也对个人健康有益。
key_sentences.pinyin: Yù fáng jí bìng yǒu zhù yú jiǎn qīng yī liáo xì tǒng de yā lì, yě duì gè rén jiàn kāng yǒu yì.
key_sentences.english: Preventing illness helps reduce the pressure on the healthcare system and is also beneficial to personal health.

key_sentences.chinese: 只有按时服用药物，才能确保治疗效果。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhǐ yǒu àn shí fú yòng yào wù, cái néng què bǎo zhì liáo xiào guǒ.
key_sentences.english: Only by taking medication on time can the effectiveness of the treatment be ensured.

grammar_points.title: 以免 — So as to avoid; lest
grammar_points.explanation: 以免 means 'so as to avoid' or 'in order to prevent'. It introduces an undesirable consequence that the speaker wants to prevent. Structure: main action + 以免 + undesirable outcome. It is similar to 'lest' in formal English. Example: 出门带伞，以免下雨淋湿。(Take an umbrella when you go out so as to avoid getting wet in the rain.)

examples.chinese: 手术前要禁食，以免麻醉时出现危险。
examples.pinyin: Shǒu shù qián yào jìn shí, yǐ miǎn má zuì shí chū xiàn wēi xiǎn.
examples.english: You must fast before surgery so as to avoid danger during anaesthesia.

examples.chinese: 每天要按时服药，以免症状复发。
examples.pinyin: Měi tiān yào àn shí fú yào, yǐ miǎn zhèng zhuàng fù fā.
examples.english: You must take your medicine on time every day so as to avoid the symptoms recurring.

exercises.question: 出门前要检查好药物，_____ 出门后才发现忘带了。
Choose the correct sentence using 以免.
exercises.correct: 要注意饮食，以免营养不均衡影响健康。
options: 要注意饮食，以免营养不均衡影响健康。
以免要注意饮食，营养不均衡影响健康。
营养不均衡以免，要注意饮食影响健康。
影响健康要注意，以免饮食营养不均衡。
option_pinyin: Yào zhù yì yǐn shí, yǐ miǎn yíng yǎng bù jūn héng yǐng xiǎng jiàn kāng.
Yǐ miǎn yào zhù yì yǐn shí, yíng yǎng bù jūn héng yǐng xiǎng jiàn kāng.
Yíng yǎng bù jūn héng yǐ miǎn, yào zhù yì yǐn shí yǐng xiǎng jiàn kāng.
Yǐng xiǎng jiàn kāng yào zhù yì, yǐ miǎn yǐn shí yíng yǎng bù jūn héng.

exercises.question: 手术后要认真休息，_____ 影响康复进度。
Which sentence uses 以免 correctly?
exercises.correct: 出门前检查一下，以免忘带钥匙。
options: 出门前检查一下，以免忘带钥匙。
以免出门前检查一下，忘带钥匙。
出门前以免检查一下，忘带钥匙。
出门前检查一下忘带钥匙，以免。

grammar_points.title: 有助于 — Be helpful to; contribute to
grammar_points.explanation: 有助于 means 'to be helpful to', 'to contribute to', or 'to promote'. It introduces a beneficial outcome. Structure: action/thing + 有助于 + beneficial outcome/noun. Example: 运动有助于身体健康。(Exercise is helpful to physical health.)

examples.chinese: 多喝水有助于提高免疫力，减少生病的机会。
examples.pinyin: Duō hē shuǐ yǒu zhù yú tí gāo miǎn yì lì, jiǎn shǎo shēng bìng de jī huì.
examples.english: Drinking plenty of water helps boost immunity and reduces the chances of falling ill.

examples.chinese: 定期体检有助于早期发现疾病，及时进行医疗干预。
examples.pinyin: Dìng qī tǐ jiǎn yǒu zhù yú zǎo qī fā xiàn jí bìng, jí shí jìn xíng yī liáo gān yù.
examples.english: Regular physical examinations help with early detection of illness and timely medical intervention.

exercises.question: 均衡的营养 _____ 身体康复，也能提高免疫力。
Choose the correct sentence using 有助于.
exercises.correct: 良好的饮食习惯有助于预防很多疾病。
options: 良好的饮食习惯有助于预防很多疾病。
良好的饮食习惯预防有助于很多疾病。
预防很多疾病，良好的饮食有助于习惯。
有助于良好的饮食习惯，预防很多疾病。
option_pinyin: Liáng hǎo de yǐn shí xí guàn yǒu zhù yú yù fáng hěn duō jí bìng.
Liáng hǎo de yǐn shí xí guàn yù fáng yǒu zhù yú hěn duō jí bìng.
Yù fáng hěn duō jí bìng, liáng hǎo de yǐn shí yǒu zhù yú xí guàn.
Yǒu zhù yú liáng hǎo de yǐn shí xí guàn, yù fáng hěn duō jí bìng.

exercises.question: What does 有助于 mean?
exercises.correct: To be helpful to; to contribute to
options: To be helpful to; to contribute to

exercises.question: 坚持运动 _____ 保持身体健康，减少去医院的次数。
Which sentence uses 有助于 correctly?
exercises.correct: 每天跑步有助于保持健康。
options: 每天跑步有助于保持健康。
有助于每天跑步保持健康。
每天跑步保持有助于健康。
每天跑步保持健康有助于。

grammar_points.title: 只有…才… — Only if… then…
grammar_points.explanation: 只有…才… expresses that the result in the second clause can only be achieved if the condition in the first clause is met. Structure: 只有 + condition + (subject) + 才 + result. It is stronger than 如果…就… because it stresses that the condition is the one and only way. Example: 只有努力才能成功。(Only through hard work can one succeed.)

examples.chinese: 只有坚持锻炼，才能保持身体健康，减少生病。
examples.pinyin: Zhǐ yǒu jiān chí duàn liàn, cái néng bǎo chí shēn tǐ jiàn kāng, jiǎn shǎo shēng bìng.
examples.english: Only by persisting with exercise can one maintain physical health and fall ill less often.

examples.chinese: 只有按照医生的指示服用药物，治疗才会有效果。
examples.pinyin: Zhǐ yǒu àn zhào yī shēng de zhǐ shì fú yòng yào wù, zhì liáo cái huì yǒu xiào guǒ.
examples.english: Only by taking medication according to the doctor's instructions will the treatment be effective.

exercises.question: _____ 定期做身体检查，_____ 能早期发现症状。
Choose the correct sentence using 只有…才…
exercises.correct: 只有注意饮食习惯，才能真正保持健康。
options: 只有注意饮食习惯，才能真正保持健康。
只有才注意饮食习惯，能真正保持健康。
注意饮食习惯只有，才能真正保持健康。
才能真正保持健康，只有注意饮食习惯。
option_pinyin: Zhǐ yǒu zhù yì yǐn shí xí guàn, cái néng zhēn zhèng bǎo chí jiàn kāng.
Zhǐ yǒu cái zhù yì yǐn shí xí guàn, néng zhēn zhèng bǎo chí jiàn kāng.
Zhù yì yǐn shí xí guàn zhǐ yǒu, cái néng zhēn zhèng bǎo chí jiàn kāng.
Cái néng zhēn zhèng bǎo chí jiàn kāng, zhǐ yǒu zhù yì yǐn shí xí guàn.

exercises.question: What does 只有…才… express?
exercises.correct: Only if this condition is met can the result happen
options: Only if this condition is met can the result happen
Even though the condition exists, the result does not follow
Because the condition exists, the result always follows
The result happens regardless of the condition

exercises.question: 只有提高免疫力，_____ 能减少生病的次数。
只有…才… is stronger than 如果…就… because:
exercises.correct: It stresses that the condition is the only way to achieve the result
options: It stresses that the condition is the only way to achieve the result
It is used for negative sentences only
It can be used without a condition

culture_notes.title: Traditional Chinese Medicine and Modern Healthcare
culture_notes.content: China has a long tradition of medicine that dates back thousands of years. Traditional Chinese Medicine (中医, Zhōng yī) encompasses practices such as acupuncture (针灸, zhēn jiǔ), herbal remedies (草药, cǎo yào), and cupping therapy (拔罐, bá guàn). These approaches focus on restoring balance and harmony within the body rather than simply treating individual symptoms (症状, zhèng zhuàng). Today, China operates a dual healthcare system where patients can choose between Western medicine (西医, Xī yī) and traditional Chinese medicine, or even a combination of both. Many Chinese people believe that prevention (预防, yù fáng) is more important than cure, following the principle 上医治未病 (shàng yī zhì wèi bìng), meaning 'the best doctor treats illness before it occurs'. This preventative philosophy encourages good dietary habits (饮食习惯, yǐn shí xí guàn) and regular physical activity to maintain immunity and overall wellbeing.

idioms.english: Prevent trouble before it happens — a stitch in time saves nine

quiz.question: Which word means 'dietary habits; eating habits'?
Fill in the blank: 出门前带好药物，_____ 出去后找不到药。
Fill in the blank: 定期检查 _____ 早期发现疾病。
Choose the correct sentence using 只有…才…
quiz.correct: 只有按时服药，才能保证治疗效果。
options: 只有按时服药，才能保证治疗效果。
才能按时服药，只有保证治疗效果。
只才有按时服药，能保证治疗效果。
按时服药保证，只有才能治疗效果。

quiz.question: What does the phrase 定期检查 mean?
The idiom 防患于未然 means:
options: Treat an illness after it becomes serious

quiz.question: What does the phrase 术后康复 mean?
Which grammar pattern means 'only if… then…'?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 张医生，我最近总是头疼，还有点发烧，这些症状已经有三天了。
lines.pinyin: Zhāng yī shēng, wǒ zuì jìn zǒng shì tóu téng, hái yǒu diǎn fā shāo, zhè xiē zhèng zhuàng yǐ jīng yǒu sān tiān le.
lines.english: Dr Zhang, I've been having constant headaches and a slight fever recently; these symptoms have been going on for three days.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我先帮您做个检查。您最近的饮食习惯怎么样？有没有按时吃饭、多喝水？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xiān bāng nín zuò gè jiǎn chá. Nín zuì jìn de yǐn shí xí guàn zěn me yàng? Yǒu méi yǒu àn shí chī fàn, duō hē shuǐ?
lines.english: Let me do a check-up for you first. How have your dietary habits been recently? Have you been eating on time and drinking plenty of water?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 不太规律，工作忙的时候经常不吃早饭，营养也不均衡。
lines.pinyin: Bú tài guī lǜ, gōng zuò máng de shí hou jīng cháng bù chī zǎo fàn, yíng yǎng yě bù jūn héng.
lines.english: Not very regular. When work is busy I often skip breakfast, and my nutrition is unbalanced too.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这样不好，只有保持良好的饮食习惯，才能真正提高免疫力。
lines.pinyin: Zhè yàng bù hǎo, zhǐ yǒu bǎo chí liáng hǎo de yǐn shí xí guàn, cái néng zhēn zhèng tí gāo miǎn yì lì.
lines.english: That's not good. Only by maintaining good dietary habits can you truly boost your immunity.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我明白了。那我这次需要吃药物治疗吗？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ míng bai le. Nà wǒ zhè cì xū yào chī yào wù zhì liáo ma?
lines.english: I understand. Do I need medication treatment this time?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我给您开一些药，记得按时服用，以免症状加重。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ gěi nín kāi yī xiē yào, jì de àn shí fú yòng, yǐ miǎn zhèng zhuàng jiā zhòng.
lines.english: I'll prescribe some medicine for you; remember to take it on time so as to avoid the symptoms worsening.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好的，谢谢张医生！我一定会注意饮食，也会定期来检查。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, xiè xie Zhāng yī shēng! Wǒ yī dìng huì zhù yì yǐn shí, yě huì dìng qī lái jiǎn chá.
lines.english: Thank you, Dr Zhang! I will definitely pay attention to my diet and come for regular check-ups.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 李阿姨，您的手术很成功，现在正处于康复阶段，需要好好休息。
lines.pinyin: Lǐ ā yí, nín de shǒu shù hěn chéng gōng, xiàn zài zhèng chǔ yú kāng fù jiē duàn, xū yào hǎo hǎo xiū xi.
lines.english: Auntie Li, your surgery was very successful; you are now in the recovery phase and need to rest well.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 谢谢你！我可以吃东西了吗？之前一直禁食，感觉很没有力气。
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie nǐ! Wǒ kě yǐ chī dōng xi le ma? Zhī qián yī zhí jìn shí, gǎn jué hěn méi yǒu lì qi.
lines.english: Thank you! Can I eat now? I've been fasting all this time and feel very weak.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 可以了，但要先从清淡的食物开始，以免给肠胃增加负担。
lines.pinyin: Kě yǐ le, dàn yào xiān cóng qīng dàn de shí wù kāi shǐ, yǐ miǎn gěi cháng wèi zēng jiā fù dān.
lines.english: You can, but start with light foods first so as to avoid putting too much burden on your digestive system.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我知道了。医生说均衡营养有助于手术后的恢复，是吗？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zhī dào le. Yī shēng shuō jūn héng yíng yǎng yǒu zhù yú shǒu shù hòu de huī fù, shì ma?
lines.english: I understand. The doctor said balanced nutrition is helpful for recovery after surgery — is that right?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 是的，营养均衡非常重要，有助于提高免疫力，促进伤口愈合。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, yíng yǎng jūn héng fēi cháng zhòng yào, yǒu zhù yú tí gāo miǎn yì lì, cù jìn shāng kǒu yù hé.
lines.english: Yes, balanced nutrition is very important; it helps boost immunity and promotes wound healing.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 还有什么需要注意的吗？
lines.pinyin: Hái yǒu shén me xū yào zhù yì de ma?
lines.english: Is there anything else I need to pay attention to?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 记得按时服用医生开的药物，以免影响康复进度。出院后也要定期来检查。
lines.pinyin: Jì de àn shí fú yòng yī shēng kāi de yào wù, yǐ miǎn yǐng xiǎng kāng fù jìn dù. Chū yuàn hòu yě yào dìng qī lái jiǎn chá.
lines.english: Remember to take your prescribed medication on time so as not to affect your recovery. After leaving hospital, come for regular check-ups too.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好的，谢谢你的细心照顾，我一定好好配合治疗！
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, xiè xie nǐ de xì xīn zhào gù, wǒ yī dìng hǎo hǎo pèi hé zhì liáo!
lines.english: Thank you for your attentive care! I will definitely cooperate fully with the treatment!
